gap_description: P_wt(E_k) is still fixed to 1 and actual renewable trip states are not included.
likely_cause: Renewable trip is record_only and does not create outage state transitions.
required_fix: Implement actual renewable trip state transition and P_wt(E_k).

gap_description: P_ge(E_k) is still fixed to 1 and conventional generator outage states are not included.
likely_cause: Conventional generator protection and outage probability model is missing.
required_fix: Record and implement P_G(q) and conventional generator state transitions.

gap_description: Subsequent line outage probability parameters are not calibrated to the thesis.
likely_cause: Current project uses an engineering piecewise outage probability model.
required_fix: Replace line outage probability with thesis formula and calibrated parameters.

gap_description: Current load shedding is simplified and does not implement thesis OLS.
likely_cause: simple_load_shedding is not equivalent to the thesis optimal load shedding model.
required_fix: Implement the optimal load shedding model in equations 3-19 to 3-26.

gap_description: The formal Table 4-6 wind speed points have been rerun, but only under the current line-only model.
likely_cause: P_wt/P_ge, OLS, outage probability parameters, unit scaling, and thesis case data are still not fully aligned.
required_fix: Use the new Table 4-6 batch as cautious comparison and rerun after model calibration.

gap_description: Centralized access bus is unknown, so current centralized result is unreliable.
likely_cause: Current project uses a calibration assumption and paper_formula is diagnostic_only.
required_fix: Confirm centralized access bus from the thesis and rerun.

gap_description: Units/scales between reproduction and paper benchmark are not aligned yet.
likely_cause: Paper benchmark unit is 10^-4 while reproduction raw values are not finally scaled.
required_fix: Confirm VaR risk-value unit and scaling definition.

gap_description: Renewable penetration definition still needs confirmation.
likely_cause: Current project uses wind_capacity/base_load and the thesis denominator must be checked.
required_fix: Confirm penetration definition and update scenarios.

gap_description: Full IEEE39 bus/gen/branch thesis modifications are not confirmed.
likely_cause: Current project keeps MATPOWER case39 reference structure.

gap_description: Nonconverged-stage handling is an engineering safety rule and thesis rule is unknown.
likely_cause: The project excludes nonconverged PF/PT/VM from LFOR/NVOR to avoid nonphysical contamination.
required_fix: Confirm thesis handling for nonconvergence or islanding.
